category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Senegal market-access (ASN/PEC, energy label, NS/IEC 60335-2-24) requirements.

title.en: China-to-Senegal Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入塞内加尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入塞內加爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Senegal market-access requirements: ASN/NS standards adopting IEC, the PEC/VoC pre-shipment conformity inspection administered by the Ministry of Trade, energy labelling, NS/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, R-600a refrigerant handling, and French-language documentation.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与塞内加尔市场准入要求对照：ASN/NS标准采纳IEC、贸易部管理的PEC/VoC装运前合格评定检验、能效标识、NS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a制冷剂处理及法语文件要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與塞內加爾市場准入要求對照：ASN/NS標準採納IEC、貿易部管理的PEC/VoC裝運前合格評定檢驗、能效標識、NS/IEC 60335-2-24安全、R-600a製冷劑處理及法語文件要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Senegalese legislation, ASN/NS standards, the PEC/VoC conformity programme requirements, energy labelling rules, and French-language documentation obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行塞内加尔法律、ASN/NS标准、PEC/VoC合格评定项目要求、能效标识规则及法语文件义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行塞內加爾法律、ASN/NS標準、PEC/VoC合格評定項目要求、能效標識規則及法語文件義務。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face several Senegal market-access gaps: (1) a pre-shipment Programme for Evaluation of Conformity (PEC / Verification of Conformity, VoC) inspection administered for the Ministry of Trade is typically required for regulated imported products, with a Certificate of Conformity needed for customs clearance at the Port of Dakar; (2) electrical safety must be demonstrated to NS/IEC 60335-2-24 (ASN adopts IEC standards as NS), and CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not directly accepted, although IEC 60335-2-24-based CB Scheme reports ease re-use; (3) an energy label / minimum energy performance regime is being rolled out for refrigerators in Senegal/West Africa and should be verified for the specific model; (4) all documentation, instructions, and labelling must be available in French; and (5) an in-country importer is required. R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 must be verified. Senegal does not operate EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regimes.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临多项塞内加尔市场准入差距：（1）受监管的进口产品通常须接受为贸易部实施的装运前合格评定项目（PEC/合格验证，VoC）检验，并取得合格证书以在达喀尔港清关；（2）电气安全须按NS/IEC 60335-2-24证明（ASN将IEC标准采纳为NS国家标准），CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被直接接受，但基于IEC 60335-2-24的CB体系报告有助于复用；（3）塞内加尔/西非正在推行电冰箱的能效标识/最低能效准入制度，须针对具体型号核实；（4）所有文件、说明书及标识须提供法语版本；（5）须有在地进口商。R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。塞内加尔不实行欧盟式的横向RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨多項塞內加爾市場准入差距：（1）受監管的進口產品通常須接受為貿易部實施的裝運前合格評定項目（PEC/合格驗證，VoC）檢驗，並取得合格證書以在達喀爾港清關；（2）電氣安全須按NS/IEC 60335-2-24證明（ASN將IEC標準採納為NS國家標準），CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被直接接受，但基於IEC 60335-2-24的CB體系報告有助於複用；（3）塞內加爾/西非正在推行電冰箱的能效標識/最低能效准入制度，須針對具體型號核實；（4）所有文件、說明書及標識須提供法語版本；（5）須有在地進口商。R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合IEC 60335-2-24。塞內加爾不實行歐盟式的橫向RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official regulator, standards body (ASN), Ministry of Trade, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal source preferred.
